enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Relief Measures by Banks in Areas Affected by Natural Calamities) Directions, 2017.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Relief Measures by Banks in Areas Affected by Natural Calamities) Directions, 2017

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (b) These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: the day they are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to every Scheduled Commercial Bank {including Small Finance Banks (SFBs) and excluding Regional Rural Banks(RRBs)} licensed to operate in India by Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: Commercial Bank {including Small Finance Banks (SFBs) and excluding Regional Rural Banks(RRBs)} licensed to operate in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, all Divisional/Zonal Offices and branches of Scheduled Commercial/Small Finance banks should be familiar with these standing instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: standing instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: It is essential that these instructions should also be made available to the State Government authorities and all the District Collectors so that all concerned are aware about the action that should be taken by the concerned authorities in the affected area.
enriched_requirements.object: to the State Government authorities and all the District Collectors so that all concerned are aware about the action that shoul

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.2 Discretionary Powers to Divisional / Zonal Manager of banks
The Divisional/Zonal Managers of scheduled commercial/SF banks must be vested with certain discretionary powers to avoid the need to seek fresh approval from their Central Office regarding the line of action decided by the District Consultative Committee/State Level Bankers' Committee.
enriched_requirements.object: discretionary powers to avoid the need to seek fresh approval from their Central Office regarding the line of action decided by

conditions: where such discretionary powers are vital may be the adoption of scale of finance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Some of the areas, among others where such discretionary powers are vital may be the adoption of scale of finance, extension of loan period, margin, security, sanction of new loan keeping in view the total liability of the borrower arising out of the old loan where the asset financed is damaged or lost due to the natural calamity and the new loan financed for creation/repair of such asset(s).
enriched_requirements.object: scale of finance, extension of loan period, margin, security, sanction of new loan keeping in view the total liability of the borro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 3.3.1 In the event of an occurrence of a natural calamity which covers a larger part of a State, the State Level Bankers' Committee convener bank should convene a meeting immediately.
The committee, in collaboration with the State Government authorities should evolve a coordinated action plan for implementing the relief programme.
enriched_requirements.object: plan for implementing the relief programme

conditions: If the calamity has affected only a small part of the state/few districts
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the calamity has affected only a small part of the state/few districts, the convener of the District Consultative Committee of the affected district(s) should convene a meeting immediately.
In the special SLBC/DCC meeting, the position of the affected areas may be assessed so as to ensure speedy formulation and implementation of suitable relief measures.
enriched_requirements.object: to ensure speedy formulation and implementation of suitable relief measures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 3.3.2 In the areas where the calamity is severe, the relief measure(s) implemented should be reviewed periodically through a specially constituted Task Force/Sub- Committee by way of weekly/fortnightly meetings as decided by the SLBC/DCC.
enriched_requirements.object: a specially constituted Task Force/Sub- Committee by way of weekly/fortnightly meetings as decided by the SLBC/DCC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Nevertheless, the common thread to extend
Page 4 of 13
relief measures including reschedulement of loans by banks, is that the crop loss assessed should be 33% or more.

when it is largely clear that most of the standing crops have been damaged and/or land and other assets have suffered a wide-spread damage, the matter be deliberated by State Government/District Authorities in the especially convened SLBC/DCC meetings where the concerned Government functionary/District Collector may explain the reasons for not estimating 'Annewari' (percentage of crop loss - by whatever name called) through crop cutting experiments and that the decision to provide relief for the affected populace needs to be taken based on the eye estimate/visual impressions.
enriched_requirements.object: not estimating 'Annewari' (percentage of crop loss - by whatever name called) through crop cutting experiments and that the de

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Therefore, relief in loan repayment, by restructuring the existing loan may become necessary.
4.1.1 All short-term loans, except those which are overdue at the time of occurrence of natural calamity, should be eligible for restructuring.
The principal amount of the short-term loan as well as interest due for repayment in the year of occurrence of the natural calamity may be converted into term loan.
enriched_requirements.object: loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.1.2 The repayment period of the restructured loan may vary depending on the severity of the calamity, the impact on loss of economic assets and distress it caused.
enriched_requirements.object: severity of the calamity, the impact on loss of economic assets and distress it caused

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A maximum repayment period of up to 2 years (including the moratorium period of 1 year) should be allowed if the loss is between 33% and 50%.
enriched_requirements.object: loss is between 33% and 50%

conditions:
If the crop
Page 5 of 13
loss is 50% or more
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the crop
Page 5 of 13
loss is 50% or more, repayment period may be extended upto a maximum of 5 years (including the 1 year moratorium period).
enriched_requirements.object: maximum of 5 years (including the 1 year moratorium period)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.1.3 In all restructured loan accounts, moratorium period of at least one year should be considered.
Banks should also not insist on additional collateral security for such restructured loans.
enriched_requirements.object: additional collateral security for such restructured loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.2.1 The existing term loan installments should be rescheduled keeping in view the repaying capacity of the borrower and the nature of natural calamity viz.
enriched_requirements.object: view the repaying capacity of the borrower and the nature of natural calamity viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.2.1.3 In regard to natural calamity under category (4.2.1.1) above, the banks may reschedule the payment of installment during the year of natural calamity and extend the loan period by one year.
enriched_requirements.object: installment during the year of natural calamity and extend the loan period by one year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The banks may also have to postpone payment of interest by borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: payment of interest by borrowers

conditions: where the borrower's assets are partially/totally damaged
if any and the fresh crop/term loan being given) less the subsidies received from the Government agencies
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: where the borrower's assets are partially/totally damaged, the rescheduling by way of extension of loan period may be determined on the basis of overall repaying capacity of the borrower vis-a-vis his total liability (old term loan, restructured crop loan, if any and the fresh crop/term loan being given) less the subsidies received from the Government agencies, compensation available under the insurance schemes, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of overall repaying capacity of the borrower vis-a-vis his total liability (old term loan, restructured crop loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: While the total repayment period for the restructured/fresh term loan will differ on case-to-case basis, generally it should not exceed a period of 5 years.
enriched_requirements.object: 5 years

conditions: If such a decision is taken
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If such a decision is taken, while recovery of all the loans be postponed by the specified period, banks will have to assess the requirement of the individual borrowers in each such case and depending on the nature of his account, repayment capacity and the need for the fresh loans, appropriate decisions shall be taken by the individual banks
enriched_requirements.object: individual banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.3.2 The primary consideration before the banks in extending credit to any unit for its rehabilitation should be based on the viability of the venture after the rehabilitation programme is implemented.
enriched_requirements.object: viability of the venture after the rehabilitation programme is implemented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.4.1 The restructured portion of the short term as well as long-term loans may be treated as current dues and need not be classified as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: dues and need not be classified as NPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Nevertheless, banks are required to make higher provisions for such restructured standard advances as prescribed by Department of Banking Regulation1 from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: for such restructured standard advances as prescribed by Department of Banking Regulation1 from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Consequently, the dues from the borrower shall be classified by the lending bank under different asset classification categories viz.
enriched_requirements.object: lending bank under different asset classification categories viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Additional finance, if any, shall be treated as "standard asset" and its future asset classification will be governed by the terms and conditions of its sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: asset" and its future asset classification will be governed by the terms and conditions of its sanction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of extreme calamity, when the SLBC/DCC is of the view that this period will
1 DBR's Master Directions on Prudential Guidelines on Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning
Page 7 of 13
not be sufficient for the banks to reschedule all the affected loans, it should immediately approach the concerned Regional Office of RBI detailing the reasons for seeking extension.
enriched_requirements.object: Regional Office of RBI detailing the reasons for seeking extension

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.4.5 The accounts that are restructured for the second time or more on account of recurrence of natural calamities should retain the same asset classification category on restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: classification category on restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.5.1 While the above measures relating to rescheduling of loans are intended to provide relief to the farmers, the insurance proceeds should, ideally, compensate their losses.
enriched_requirements.object: losses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Farmers' details are required to be entered by banks in the unified portal for crop insurance which is available at www.agri-insurance.gov.in in order to facilitate assessment of coverage of crops insured, premiums deducted, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: banks in the unified portal for crop insurance which is available at www

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.5.2 While restructuring the loans in areas affected by a natural calamity, banks should also take into account the insurance proceeds, if any, receivable from the Insurance Company.
enriched_requirements.object: the insurance proceeds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: They should adjust these proceeds to the 'restructured accounts' in cases where they have granted fresh loan to the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'restructured accounts' in cases where they have granted fresh loan to the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, banks should act with empathy and consider restructuring and granting fresh loans without waiting for the receipt of insurance claim, in cases where there is reasonable certainty of receiving the claim.
enriched_requirements.object: consider restructuring and granting fresh loans without waiting for the receipt of insurance claim, in cases where there is reaso

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.1.1 Once the decision to reschedule loans is taken by SLBC/DCC, pending conversion of short-term loans, banks shall grant fresh crop loan to the affected people based on the scale of finance for the crop and the cultivation area, as per the extant guidelines2.
enriched_requirements.object: to the affected people based on the scale of finance for the crop and the cultivation area, as per the extant guidelines2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.1.2 The bank assistance in agriculture and allied activities (poultry, fishery, animal husbandry, etc.) may also be needed for long term loans for a variety of purposes such as repair of existing economic asset(s) and/or acquisition of new asset(s).
enriched_requirements.object: long term loans for a variety of purposes such as repair of existing economic asset(s) and/or acquisition of new asset(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: in the areas affected by a natural calamity may require fresh credit to sustain their livelihood.
enriched_requirements.object: sustain their livelihood

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks should assess the need and decide on the quantum of loans to be granted to the affected borrowers taking into consideration, amongst others, their credit requirement and the due procedure for sanctioning loans.
enriched_requirements.object: decide on the quantum of loans to be granted to the affected borrowers taking into consideration, amongst others, their credit req

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks shall also grant consumption loan up to ₹ 10,000/- to existing borrowers without any collateral.
enriched_requirements.object: up to ₹ 10,000/- to existing borrowers without any collateral

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The limit may, however, be enhanced beyond ₹ 10,000/- at the bank's discretion.
enriched_requirements.object: beyond ₹ 10,000/- at the bank's discretion

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.2.1.1 Credit should not be denied for want of personal guarantees.
enriched_requirements.object: of personal guarantees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The fresh loan shall be granted even if the value of security (existing as well as the asset to be acquired from the new loan) is less than the loan amount.
enriched_requirements.object: the value of security (existing as well as the asset to be acquired from the new loan) is less than the loan amount

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
5.2.1.2 Where the crop loan (which has been converted into term loan) was earlier sanctioned against personal security/hypothecation of crop and the borrower is not able to offer charge/mortgage of land as security for the converted loan, she/he
2 Master circular on Kisan Credit card Scheme available @ www.rbi.org.in
Page 9 of 13
should not be denied conversion facility merely on the ground of his/her inability to furnish land as security.
enriched_requirements.object: merely on the ground of his/her inability to furnish land as security

conditions: If the borrower has already taken a term loan against mortgage/charge on land
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the borrower has already taken a term loan against mortgage/charge on land, the bank should be content with a second charge for the converted term loan.
enriched_requirements.object: second charge for the converted term loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks should not insist on third party guarantee for providing conversion facility.
enriched_requirements.object: guarantee for providing conversion facility

conditions: Where land is taken as security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.2.1.3 Where land is taken as security, in the absence of original title record, a certificate issued by the Revenue Department officials may be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-croppers.
enriched_requirements.object: to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-crop

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.2.1.4 Margin requirements may be waived or the grant/subsidy given by the concerned State Government may be considered as margin.
enriched_requirements.object: grant/subsidy given by the concerned State Government may be considered as margin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The banks should also suitably defer the compounding of interest charges.
enriched_requirements.object: compounding of interest charges

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks may not levy any penal interest and consider waiving penal interest, if any, already charged in regard to the loans converted/rescheduled.
enriched_requirements.object: and consider waiving penal interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Depending on the nature and severity of natural calamity, the SLBC/ DCC shall take a view on the interest rate concession that could be extended to borrowers so that there is uniformity in approach among banks in providing relief.
enriched_requirements.object: the interest rate concession that could be extended to borrowers so that there is uniformity in approach among banks in providing relie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
6.1 Relaxation on Know Your Customer (KYC) Norms
It needs to be recognized that many persons displaced or adversely affected by a major calamity may not have access to their normal identification and personal records.
enriched_requirements.object: normal identification and personal records

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In such cases a small account based on the photograph and signature or thumb impression rendered in front of the bank official shall be opened.
6.2.1 Banks may operate its natural calamity affected branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: affected branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For continuing the temporary premise beyond 30 days, banks may obtain specific approval from the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: the concerned Regional Office of RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks may also make arrangements to render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking facilities etc.
enriched_requirements.object: render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking faciliti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 6.2.2 To meet the immediate cash requirement of the affected people, due importance may be given towards restoring the ATMs or other alternate arrangements maybe provided to avail such facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: the ATMs or other alternate arrangements maybe provided to avail such facilities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 6.2.3 Other measures that banks may initiate at their discretion to alleviate the condition of the affected people could be waiving ATM fees, increasing ATM withdrawal limits;
enriched_requirements.object: to alleviate the condition of the affected people could be waiving ATM fees, increasing ATM withdrawal limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Besides, all charges debited to the farm loan account other than the normal interest may be waived considering the hardship caused to the affected people.
enriched_requirements.object: hardship caused to the affected people

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.1 Whenever RBI advises the banks to extend rehabilitation assistance to the riot/ disturbance affected persons, the aforesaid guidelines may broadly be followed by banks for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: banks for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: It should, however, be ensured that only genuine persons, duly identified by the State Administration as having been affected by the riots/ disturbances, are provided assistance as per the guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: that only genuine persons, duly identified by the State Administration as having been affected by the riots/ disturbances, are p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: With a view to ensuring quick relief to the affected persons, it has been decided that the District Collector, on occurrence of the riots/ disturbances, may ask the Lead Bank Officer to convene a meeting of the DCC, if necessary and submit a report to the DCC on the extent of damage caused to life and property in the area affected by riots/disturbances.
enriched_requirements.object: Officer to convene a meeting of the DCC

conditions: If the DCC is satisfied that there has been extensive loss to life and property on account of the riots/ disturbances
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the DCC is satisfied that there has been extensive loss to life and property on account of the riots/ disturbances, the relief as per the above guidelines may be extended to the people affected by the riots/ disturbances.
enriched_requirements.object: people affected by the riots/ disturbances

conditions: where there are no District Consultative Committees
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In certain cases, where there are no District Consultative Committees, the District Collector may request the convener of the State Level Bankers' Committee of the State to convene a meeting of the bankers to consider extension of relief to the affected persons.
enriched_requirements.object: the State Level Bankers' Committee of the State to convene a meeting of the bankers to consider extension of relief to the aff

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The report submitted by the Collector and the decision thereon of DCC/ SLBC may be recorded and should form a part of the minutes of the meeting.
enriched_requirements.object: form a part of the minutes of the meeting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A copy of the proceedings of the meeting may be forwarded to the concerned Regional Office of the Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned Regional Office of the Reserve Bank of India
